bindings.source_title: Into the Light, by Marisa Anderson
bindings.source_summary: Into the Light by Marisa Anderson, released 24 June 2016 1. Into the Light 2. In Waves 3. Waltz of Shadows 4. The Old Guard 5. He Is Without His Guns 6. Chimes 7. Resurrection 8. House of the Setting Sun 9. The Golden West 10. End of the Night All songs written and played by Marisa Anderson on guitar, lap steel, pedal steel, electric piano and percussion. Leaving Appalachia and the Delta blues behind Anderson journeys west, into the heart of the sun. Written as the soundtrack to an imaginary science-fiction western...
